---
title: "Shadira Gordon, DVM, MPVM"
subtitle: "Veterinary Epidemiologist | Data Scientist | One Health Researcher"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/s-dgordon
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/shadira-gordon-4628aa141
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:dsgordon@ucdavis.edu
---

## About Me

I am a veterinary epidemiologist working at the Center for Animal Disease Modeling and Surveillance (CADMS) at UC Davis. My work bridges veterinary medicine, data science, and public health through a One Health lens.

My research focuses on antimicrobial resistance, small ruminant disease surveillance, and infectious disease modeling. I build interactive data tools, including R Shiny dashboards for wildlife disease surveillance and livestock health monitoring, that turn complex epidemiological data into actionable insights for researchers, producers, and government agencies.

I'm interested in developing strategies for emerging zoonotic threats preparedness, improving global disease surveillance systems, and preventing and controlling infectious diseases through a One Health approach.

## Highlights

-   **Data Tools**: R Shiny dashboards deployed for California Department of Fish and Wildlife and dairy sheep producers
-   **Research**: Longitudinal studies, AMR surveillance, outbreak investigation
-   **Teaching**: Disease ecology, epidemiology course content development
